title: Venus Protocol - Rekt IV
relevance_summary: Collateral inflation exploit via donation attack on supply cap

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sets Collateral Factor to zero after a large donation to supply cap

red_flags: Large donation to supply cap followed by setting Collateral Factor to zero
summary: An attacker manipulated the supply cap of Venus Protocol's vTHE token by donating to it, then setting the Collateral Factor to zero, causing a significant loss of funds. A guard could have detected this by blocking any transaction that sets the Collateral Factor to zero after a large donation to the supply cap.
